vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

risk.desc: Potential weak interface at bay_door hinge due to high thermal cycling.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies around the hinge.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow to motor pod.
risk.mit: Ensure proper airflow path design and conduct flow tests.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Include detailed assembly sequence and use alignment tools.

risk.desc: Risk of service access obstruction by structural reinforcement.
risk.mit: Design service access points to be unobstructed by reinforcement.

risk.desc: Risk of overestimating material strength leading to failure.
risk.mit: Conduct material strength tests and update design if necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.path_description: Heat from solar exposure flows into the equipment bay door for dissipation.
Structural loads from wing bending are transferred to the wing spar for reinforcement.
Airflow from the external environment passes through the cooling inlet for motor pod cooling.
Electrical signals from the bay door are routed to the motor pod for control.
Human service access is provided through the service window to the equipment bay.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP spar and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Use thermally compatible materials or design with expansion joints.

risk.desc: Risk of spar failure due to insufficient material strength at high g-forces.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical areas.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to complex interface.
risk.mit: Improve alignment features and provide detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through service access panel.
risk.mit: Design with waterproof seals and gaskets.

risk.desc: Risk of payload interference with spar socket during installation.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance and provide installation guides.

Electrical connector must provide clean signal and power
